allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json,re; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); pages=d['query']['pages']; p=next\(iter\(pages.values\(\)\)\); content=p.get\('revisions',[{}]\)[0].get\('*',''\); matches=re.findall\(r'image\\s*=\\s*\([^\\n\\|]+\)', content\); print\('TENNIS_BORUSSIA:', matches[:3]\)")
